title: Thank You (Not So Bad)
why_this_song: Thank You (Not So Bad) by Tiësto (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: But your picture on my wall
It reminds me that it's not so bad
But your picture on my wall
And even if I could, it'd all be gray
But your picture on my wall

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it'd" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: My tea's gone cold, I'm wondering why
But your picture on my wall

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Thank You (Not So Bad)" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Thank You (Not So Bad)" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Thank You (Not So Bad)" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Thank You (Not So Bad)" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Thank You (Not So Bad)" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Thank You (Not So Bad)"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Thank You (Not So Bad)", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Thank You (Not So Bad)", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Thank You (Not So Bad)" was released in 2024. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Thank You (Not So Bad)" foi lançada em 2024. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Tiësto one question about "Thank You (Not So Bad)", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Tiësto sobre "Thank You (Not So Bad)", o que seria e por quê?
